lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: Have you seen my keys? I've checked every pocket.

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: [confused] Why would they be in the freezer?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: Last Tuesday. You put them down when you grabbed ice cream.

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: [gasps] They're in there. [embarrassed] Don't tell anyone.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: [laughing] Too late, I already texted your mum.
